debug_info.goal:
H : Type u_1
inst✝² : NormedAddCommGroup H
inst✝¹ : InnerProductSpace ℂ H
inst✝ : CompleteSpace H
a : H →L[ℂ] H
ha : IsSelfAdjoint a
f : C(↑(spectrum ℂ a), ℂ)
⊢ ∀ ⦃w₁ w₂ : Set ↑(spectrum ℂ a)⦄,
    MeasurableSet w₁ →
      MeasurableSet w₂ →
        Disjoint w₁ w₂ →
          continuousLinearMapOfBilin (@toBoundedBilin H inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝ a ha 1 ((w₁ ∪ w₂).indicator 1)) =
            continuousLinearMapOfBilin (@toBoundedBilin H inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝ a ha 1 (w₁.indicator 1)) +
              continuousLinearMapOfBilin (@toBoundedBilin H inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝ a ha 1 (w₂.indicator 1))

failed_attempts:
fun w₁ w₂ hw₁ hw₂ h_disj => by
    rw [← (InnerProductSpace.continuousLinearMapOfBilin : _ ≃ₗ[ℂ] _).map_add]
    congr 1
    ext x y
    simp only [toBoundedBilin, ContinuousLinearMap.coe_mk', LinearMap.coe_mk,
      ContinuousLinearMap.add_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.coe_add, Pi.add_apply]
    rw [← ComplexMeasure.integral_add]
    · congr
      exact Set.indicator_union_of_disjoint h_disj (fun _ => (1 : ℂ))
    all_goals
      apply MeasureTheory.Measure.integrable_of_bound (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation 1
      · apply MeasureTheory.Measurable.indicator MeasureTheory.measurable_const
        assumption
      · filter_upwards with z
        simp only [Set.indicator_apply, Pi.one_apply, norm_eq_abs, abs_one, abs_zero]
        split_ifs <;> norm_num

fun w₁ w₂ hw₁ hw₂ hdisj => by
    rw [Set.indicator_union_of_disjoint hdisj (1 : (spectrum ℂ a) → ℂ)]
    apply continuousLinearMapOfBilin.injective
    ext x y
    dsimp [toBoundedBilin]
    let μ := cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y
    have h_int : ∀ s, MeasurableSet s → Integrable (Set.indicator s (1 : (spectrum ℂ a) → ℂ)) μ := fun s hs => by
      have : IsFiniteMeasure μ.variation := IsFiniteMeasure.mk <| lt_of_le_of_lt
        (cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y) (by apply ENNReal.mul_lt_top <;> simp)
      apply Integrable.of_forall_le_bound (integrable_const 1) (by exact 1)
      · intro z; simp [Set.indicator_apply]; split_ifs <;> simp
      · exact Measurable.indicator measurable_const hs
    rw [ComplexMeasure.integral_add (h_int w₁ hw₁) (h_int w₂ hw₂)]
    rfl

fun w₁ w₂ hw₁ hw₂ hdisj => by
    rw [← map_add]
    congr 1
    ext x y
    simp only [toBoundedBilin, ContinuousLinearMap.coe_mk', LinearMap.coe_mk,
      ContinuousLinearMap.add_apply]
    have h_fin : IsFiniteMeasure (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation :=
      ⟨lt_of_le_of_lt (cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y) ENNReal.coe_lt_top⟩
    have h_int (s : Set (spectrum ℂ a)) (hs : MeasurableSet s) :
        Integrable (s.indicator (1 : _ → ℂ)) (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation := by
      refine (Measurable.indicator measurable_const hs).integrable_of_bounded
        (eventually_of_forall fun z => ?_) h_fin
      by_cases z ∈ s <;> simp [h]
    rw [← VectorMeasure.integral_add (h_int w₁ hw₁) (h_int w₂ hw₂)]
    congr with z
    exact Set.indicator_union_of_disjoint hdisj (fun _ => 1) z
